name: Jewel from the Heavens
original_name: มณีแดนสรวง
overview: Chilo, a curious angel, and her friend Oosoam are banished to Earth after sabotaging a wedding they believe wasn't meant to be. To return to heaven, they must reunite the couple while navigating the unintended consequences of their actions.

trailers.title: มณีแดนสรวง ~ Teaser 1 (Manee Dan Sruang)
